user.title: Configure Lutron Fader
user.description: Connect to your Lutron hub via Telnet to enable fade time support.

data_description.ping_zone: Zone ID to use for connection keep-alive pings (default: 1)

report.title: Paste Integration Report
report.description:
Paste your Lutron Integration Report to discover your zones automatically. In the Lutron app, go to Settings → Advanced → Integration → Send Integration Report, then copy and paste the full report text below.

Leave blank to skip — you can configure zones later using the `lutron_fader.auto_configure_from_report` service.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Lutron hub
error.report_parse_failed: Could not find any zones in the report. Check that you pasted the full report text and try again.

abort.already_configured: Lutron Fader is already configured for this hub

fade_light.name: Fade Light
fade_light.description: Fade a Lutron light to a target brightness over a specified duration.

parse_integration_report.name: Parse Integration Report
parse_integration_report.description: Parse a Lutron Integration Report and generate zone mappings configuration.

report_text.name: Integration Report
report_text.description: Paste the full Integration Report text from the Lutron app
